raw.message: Everyone thinks Match 3 is boring... until they try Jolly Match😀

hook.summary: A 3D animated woman spins in a magical swirl of ingredients and petals.
hook.visual_action: The character spins gracefully while a trail of spices, shells, and flower petals orbits her against a fantasy castle background.

scene_flow: Introduction of the 3D character spinning in a magical vortex of ingredients.
Close-up shot of the character's joyful expression as she continues to spin.
Wide shot showing the character, the game logo, and the fantasy castle environment.
audience_proxy: Casual women 25-45 who enjoy high-quality 3D animated puzzle games with a magical or culinary theme.
